---
title: "Marketing Report"
format:
    html: 
        theme: cosmo
    pdf:
        toc: false
---


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Libraries required in this report. Install packages as required.
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

### Introduction
This report investigates if higher marketing spend per customer lead to higher purchase amounts using the campaign data of 150 customers. Understanding this relationship will allow us to optimise future marketing budgets towards customers who generate more return.

### Research question
